info.name: Zentora
info.description: Complete Postman collection for the Zentora e-commerce catalog API. Covers authentication, categories, brands, tags, attributes, products, variants, inventory, and discounts.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for registration, login, session management, and password flows.

item.name: Register
item.description: Create a new user account.

item.name: Login
item.description: Authenticate and receive a JWT access token. Copy the token into the admin_token or user_token collection variable.

item.name: Get Me
item.description: Retrieve the authenticated user profile.

item.name: Logout
item.description: Invalidate the current session token.

item.name: Change Password
item.description: Change the authenticated user password.

item.name: Forgot Password
item.description: Request a password reset email for the given address.

item.name: Reset Password
item.description: Reset the password using the token received by email.

item.name: Get Active Sessions
item.description: List all active sessions for the current user.

item.name: Revoke Session
item.description: Revoke a specific session by its ID.

item.name: Categories
item.description: Manage product categories. Categories are hierarchical using a closure table. Slugs are auto-generated from names.

item.name: List Categories
item.description: Retrieve all categories. Optional query params: active_only=true, parent_id=0 (roots only), parent_id=N (children of N).

query.description: 0 = root categories only; N = children of category N

item.name: Get Category
item.description: Retrieve a single category by its numeric ID.

item.name: Get Category Tree
item.description: Retrieve a category with its full ancestor chain (breadcrumb path) using the closure table.

item.name: Get Category Descendants
item.description: Retrieve all descendants of a category (all levels) using the closure table. Returns ancestor_id, descendant_id, and depth.

item.name: Create Category
item.description: Admin: Create a new category. Slug is auto-generated from the name. parent_id is optional — omit for a root category.

item.name: Create Sub-Category
item.description: Admin: Create a child category under an existing parent. The closure table trigger populates all ancestor rows automatically.

item.name: Update Category
item.description: Admin: Partially update a category. Set parent_id to 0 to make it a root. Changing the name regenerates the slug.

item.name: Delete Category
item.description: Admin: Delete a category. The closure table rows are removed automatically by the database trigger.

item.name: Brands
item.description: Manage product brands. Slugs are auto-generated from names. Brands are created in advance before products.

item.name: List Brands
item.description: Retrieve all brands. Use active_only=true to filter inactive brands.

item.name: Get Brand
item.description: Retrieve a single brand by ID.

item.name: Create Brand
item.description: Admin: Create a new brand. Slug is auto-generated from the name. logo_url is optional.

item.name: Update Brand
item.description: Admin: Partially update a brand. Only provided fields are updated. Changing the name regenerates the slug.

item.name: Delete Brand
item.description: Admin: Delete a brand by ID.

item.name: Tags
item.description: Product tags. Tags are created automatically (find-or-create) when added to a product. Public read-only endpoints are provided.

item.name: List Tags
item.description: Retrieve all tags ordered by name.

item.name: Get Tag
item.description: Retrieve a single tag by ID.

item.name: Get Product Tags
item.description: Retrieve all tags linked to a specific product.

item.name: Add Tag to Product
item.description: Admin: Add a single tag to a product by name. If the tag does not exist it is created automatically (find-or-create).

item.name: Remove Tag from Product
item.description: Admin: Remove a tag link from a product by tag ID. Does not delete the tag itself.

item.name: Set Product Tags
item.description: Admin: Replace all tags on a product atomically. Tags that do not exist are created automatically. Existing tags not in the list are unlinked.

item.name: Attributes
item.description: Product attributes (e.g. Color, Size) and their values (e.g. Red, XL). Attributes flagged as is_variant_dimension are used to define variant combinations.

item.name: List Attributes
item.description: Retrieve all attributes. Append ?with_values=true to include attribute values in the response.

item.name: Get Attribute
item.description: Retrieve a single attribute by ID.

item.name: List Attribute Values
item.description: Retrieve all values for a given attribute.

item.name: Create Attribute
item.description: Admin: Create a new attribute. Set is_variant_dimension=true for attributes that define product variants (e.g. Size, Color).

item.name: Update Attribute
item.description: Admin: Partially update an attribute. Changing the name regenerates the slug.

item.name: Delete Attribute
item.description: Admin: Delete an attribute and all its values (cascades via FK).

item.name: Add Attribute Value
item.description: Admin: Add a new value to an existing attribute.

item.name: Delete Attribute Value
item.description: Admin: Delete a specific attribute value by its ID. Use value_id path param.

item.name: Get Product Attribute Values
item.description: Retrieve all attribute values linked at the product level (not variant level).

item.name: Set Product Attribute Values
item.description: Admin: Replace all attribute values linked to a product atomically. Values must already exist in attribute_values.

item.name: Products
item.description: Core product management. Product creation is fully transactional — brand, categories, images (file upload), variants, tags, attributes, inventory, and discount targets are all created in a single transaction.

item.name: List Products
item.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products. Supports filtering by status, brand, category, featured flag, and keyword search.

query.description: Keyword search on name and short_description

item.name: Get Product by ID
item.description: Retrieve a product by ID. Add load_related=true to fetch categories, tags, attribute values, and variants in one call. Images are always returned.

query.description: Include categories, tags, attribute values, variants

item.name: Get Product by Slug
item.description: Retrieve a product by its URL slug. Always loads full related data.

item.name: Create Product
item.description: Admin: Create a product with all related data in a single transaction. Requires multipart/form-data. The JSON fields are sent as the 'data' part and images as 'images' files. brand_id, at least one category_id, at least one variant, and at least one image are required.

formdata.value:
{
  "name": "Samsung Galaxy S24",
  "description": "Flagship Android smartphone with AI features.",
  "short_description": "Galaxy S24 - AI-powered flagship.",
  "brand_id": 1,
  "base_price": 999.99,
  "status": "active",
  "is_featured": true,
  "is_digital": false,
  "category_ids": [1, 2],
  "tag_names": ["smartphone", "android", "5g"],
  "attribute_value_ids": [1, 2],
  "variants": [
    {
      "sku": "SGS24-BLK-256",
      "price": 999.99,
      "weight": 0.167,
      "is_active": true,
      "attribute_value_ids": [1, 3],
      "quantity": 100,
      "location_id": 1
    },
    {
      "sku": "SGS24-WHT-256",
      "price": 999.99,
      "weight": 0.167,
      "is_active": true,
      "attribute_value_ids": [2, 3],
      "quantity": 80
    }
  ],
  "discount": {
    "discount_id": 1
  }
}

formdata.description: Primary product image (first file is set as primary)

item.name: Update Product
item.description: Admin: Partially update a product. Only provided fields are updated. Changing the name regenerates the slug.

item.name: Delete Product
item.description: Admin: Delete a product. All related rows (images, tags, categories, variants, inventory) are cascade-deleted by FK constraints.

item.name: Get Product Images
item.description: Retrieve all images for a product ordered by primary flag then sort_order.

item.name: Add Product Image
item.description: Admin: Upload a single image file for a product. Use multipart/form-data with field name 'image'.

item.name: Delete Product Image
item.description: Admin: Delete a product image by its image ID.

item.name: Set Primary Image
item.description: Admin: Mark one image as primary and clear the flag on all other images for the same product.

item.name: Get Product Categories
item.description: Retrieve all categories linked to a product.

item.name: Add Product Categories
item.description: Admin: Link one or more categories to a product. Existing links are preserved (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING).

item.name: Remove Product Category
item.description: Admin: Remove a single category link from a product.

item.name: Variants
item.description: Product variants combine a product with specific attribute values (e.g. Red + XL). Each variant has its own SKU and price.

item.name: List Variants by Product
item.description: Retrieve all variants for a product. Use active_only=true to filter inactive variants.

item.name: Get Variant
item.description: Retrieve a single variant by its variant_id.

item.name: Create Variant
item.description: Admin: Create a new variant for an existing product. Optionally link attribute value IDs that define this variant combination.

item.name: Update Variant
item.description: Admin: Partially update a variant. Only provided fields are updated.

item.name: Delete Variant
item.description: Admin: Delete a variant. Inventory items and attribute value links are cascade-deleted.

item.name: Get Variant Attribute Values
item.description: Retrieve the attribute value IDs linked to a variant.

item.name: Set Variant Attribute Values
item.description: Admin: Replace all attribute values linked to a variant atomically.

item.name: Inventory
item.description: Inventory locations and per-variant stock management. Stock operations (reserve, release, adjust) are transactional.

item.name: List Locations
item.description: Retrieve all inventory locations. Use active_only=true to filter.

item.name: Get Location
item.description: Retrieve a single inventory location by ID.

item.name: Create Location
item.description: Admin: Create a new inventory location. location_code must be unique. The code MAIN is treated as the default fallback.

item.name: Update Location
item.description: Admin: Partially update an inventory location.

item.name: Delete Location
item.description: Admin: Delete an inventory location. All inventory items at this location are cascade-deleted.

item.name: Get Inventory by Variant
item.description: Retrieve all inventory items for a variant across all locations, including location name and code.

item.name: Get Stock Summary
item.description: Retrieve aggregated stock totals (available, reserved, incoming) across all locations for a variant.

item.name: Upsert Inventory Item
item.description: Admin: Insert or update inventory quantities for a variant at a specific location. If the row exists it is updated; otherwise it is inserted.

item.name: Adjust Available Stock
item.description: Admin: Atomically increment or decrement available_qty by a delta. Use a negative delta to decrease. Returns ErrInsufficientStock if the result would go below zero.

item.name: Reserve Stock
item.description: Admin: Move qty from available_qty to reserved_qty atomically. Used when an order is placed. Fails if available stock is insufficient.

item.name: Release Stock
item.description: Admin: Move qty back from reserved_qty to available_qty atomically. Used when an order is cancelled.

query.description: Quantity to release back to available

item.name: Delete Inventory Item
item.description: Admin: Remove an inventory item row for a specific variant-location combination.

item.name: Discounts
item.description: Discount codes and promotions. Discounts can target specific products, categories, or brands. Redemptions are recorded per order.

item.name: List Discounts
item.description: Admin: Retrieve all discounts. Use active_only=true to filter, or code=X to look up a specific code.

item.name: Get Discount
item.description: Admin: Retrieve a discount with its targets by ID.

item.name: Create Discount - Percentage
item.description: Admin: Create a percentage discount. value must be between 0 and 100. Optionally attach targets (product/category/brand) in the same request.

item.name: Create Discount - Fixed
item.description: Admin: Create a fixed-amount discount. value is the amount deducted from the order total.

item.name: Update Discount
item.description: Admin: Partially update a discount. Only provided fields are changed.

item.name: Set Discount Targets
item.description: Admin: Replace all targets for a discount atomically. target_type must be 'product', 'category', or 'brand'.

item.name: Delete Discount
item.description: Admin: Delete a discount and all its targets and redemptions (cascade).

item.name: User Addresses
item.description: Manage saved delivery addresses for the authenticated user.

item.name: List Addresses
item.description: Retrieve all saved addresses for the current user.

item.name: Create Address
item.description: Save a new delivery address for the current user. Set is_default=true to make it the default.

item.name: Get Address
item.description: Retrieve a single address by ID.

item.name: Update Address
item.description: Update a saved address. All fields may be partially updated.

item.name: Delete Address
item.description: Delete a saved address by ID.

item.name: Set Default Address
item.description: Mark an address as the default delivery address. Clears the default flag on all other addresses.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: In-app notifications for the authenticated user and admin broadcast endpoints.

item.name: Get Notifications
item.description: Retrieve paginated notifications for the current user.

item.name: Get Latest Notifications
item.description: Retrieve the most recent notifications (typically used for the notification bell dropdown).

item.name: Get Unread Count
item.description: Retrieve the total count of unread notifications for the current user.

item.name: Get Notification Summary
item.description: Retrieve a summary of notification counts grouped by type or read status.

item.name: Mark As Read
item.description: Mark a single notification as read by its ID.

item.name: Mark All As Read
item.description: Mark all unread notifications as read for the current user.

item.name: Delete Notification
item.description: Delete a single notification by its ID.

item.name: Admin - Create Notification
item.description: Admin: Create a targeted notification for a specific user.

item.name: Admin - Bulk Notifications
item.description: Admin: Send a notification to multiple users at once.

item.name: Admin - Broadcast Notification
item.description: Admin: Send a notification to all users.

item.name: Health
item.description: Service health check endpoint. No authentication required.

item.name: Health Check
item.description: Returns HTTP 200 with status ok when the service is running.
